positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0) | shares_with_lisa(karen,X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    is_netflix_show(stranger_things)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~downloads(karen,X0) | binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~binge_watches(karen,X0) | downloads(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    is_netflix_show(black_mirror)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~downloads(karen,black_mirror)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    ~shares_with_lisa(karen,black_mirror)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_popular(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:

% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    is_netflix_show(stranger_things)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~downloads(karen,X0) | binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~binge_watches(karen,X0) | downloads(karen,X0) | ~is_netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    is_netflix_show(black_mirror)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~downloads(karen,black_mirror)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,

for all inputs,
